name: meep-adjoint-devices-v1
description: First adjoint-driven photonic-device benchmark using a single MaterialGrid splitter task.
paper_hypothesis: A dedicated MEEP adjoint workflow can outperform the current block-based splitter path and establish a reproducible freeform photonics baseline.

baseline_notes: This is the first adjoint smoke benchmark, not a literature-facing performance benchmark.
Judge the run on reproducibility, artifact capture, and whether it materially beats the current block-based splitter baseline.
